item.name: Tsoly Gar
item.description:
A large, long-nosed freshwater fish indigenous to the waters of Yak T'el.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The bright green hue comes not from its scales, but the moss with which it cloaks itself. Some have speculated that it does this to better resemble a crocodile and therefore deter predators.
